samples.xml_description:
Implement a 16-bit full adder in combinational logic. 16-bit input operand A. 16-bit input operand B. Carry-in input. 16-bit sum output. Carry-out output.

Design a 16-bit full adder.

Use a single assign statement to perform the addition.
samples.tb_log:
[COMPILE verilator+cpp]
%Warning-WIDTH: adder_16bit.v:13:32: Operator ADD expects 17 bits on the RHS, but RHS's VARREF 'Cin' generates 1 bits.
                                   : ... In instance adder_16bit
   13 |     assign {cout, sum} = a + b + Cin;
      |                                ^
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
